name: Megaman Legends 1-2 World Simulation
description:
WIP. This is a scenario simulation based on the events of MML1 (it can also delve into MML2 as a sequel of sorts). Only a few characters have been detailedly added to the lorebook yet, but if you're using a proxy AI, it might do just fine, might. I've also added about 95% of all the Reaverbots, which is somewhere around 8k tokens in total through the lorebook. Should be good for your Digger-dwelling needs.

Check the "List of Reaverbots" section for reference in this wiki page:

https://megaman.fandom.com/wiki/Reaverbot

The Police, Bonne & Loath Air Pirates' background info, and every machine and aircraft are also catalogued through the lorebook, that should be at least another 9k reduced.

Machine References:

https://megaman.fandom.com/wiki/Bonne_family

https://megaman.fandom.com/wiki/Loath_family

https://megaman.fandom.com/wiki/Police_(Mega_Man_Legends)

Also, this is untested with JLLM. Probably for the best to keep using Proxy AI. And let me know if something goes wrong with the bot, hopefully I might be able to fix or tweak it, or something. If the bot seems to talk for you, lengthening your response works. Try forming at least two sentences in your responses - a simple YES as a response might sometimes have the bot talk and interpret your own stuff.

All characters have been are depicted to be at least 18 years of age.
creator: GFSA
